/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc --sysroot=/opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libcrb_ros_msg__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/crb_ros_msg/libcrb_ros_msg__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/crb_ros_msg__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/crb_ros_msg/msg/_upper_joint_data_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/action_data_offset_ws/build_aarch64/crb_ros_msg:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libcrb_ros_msg__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so libcrb_ros_msg__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib
